calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Continued To Jan-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgments As To Allied Old English, Inc. And Wholesome Sweeteners, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eric Somers, Esq. 415-913-7800 of Lexington Law Group for Plaintiff.
Robert Falk, Esq. 415-268-6294 of Morrison Foerster for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH's Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgments As To Allied Old English, Inc. And Wholesome Sweeteners, Inc.

Plaintiff Center for Environmental Health's motion for court approval and entry of consent judgments as to Allied Old English, Inc. and Wholesome Sweeteners, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

An order and 2 consent judgments are signed. (see scanned order/consent judgments for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
